title: Sunday Service
description: Join us for our weekly Sunday worship service with praise, prayer, and the Word.

title: Youth Meeting
description: A time for young people to connect, grow in faith, and have fun together.

title: Choir Practice
description: Rehearsal for the church choir. All singers welcome!

title: Palm Sunday Service
description: We begin Holy Week by commemorating Jesus' triumphal entry into Jerusalem.

title: Maundy Thursday Service
description: Service of Holy Communion and foot washing, commemorating the Last Supper.

title: Good Friday Service
description: A solemn service of reflection and worship as we remember the crucifixion of our Lord.

title: Easter Sunday Service
description: Celebrate the resurrection of Jesus Christ! Join us for a joyful Easter worship service.
